title: Step 2: Positioning the Frame Object
description:
Step 2: Positioning the Frame Object

Step 2: Positioning the Frame Object

You should now see a Frame object similar to the one shown below:

New Frame Object

Frame objects do not have a sizeable window.  Click the name label of the Frame object or anywhere along one of it's axes and while holding the mouse down drag the entire Frame object to a new location on the screen.  When you find the position you like, release the mouse and the Frame object will stay in this new position on the screen.
